name: 凤池生春
overview: Qi Yuan, a butcher’s daughter who is secretly the true heiress of a noble family, suffers betrayal and persecution at the hands of a false heiress. After becoming a guard for Prince Jing, Xiao Yunting, she develops feelings for him. However, tragedy strikes on their wedding night, leading to her death. Reborn, Qi Yuan sets out to change her fate, seeking revenge and a second chance at love.
